name: Dr. Vladimir Pastouk, DMD, ND
core_positioning: World-renowned biological dentist with 30+ years of clinical experience who discovered that conventional dentistry was looking at the wrong thing — and spent three decades proving that the mouth is the gateway to the entire body

identity.core_philosophy: Dr. Pastouk operates from a foundational conviction that the mouth is not a separate organ — it is the gateway to every system in the body. He arrived at this not through theory but through 30 years of observing clinical patterns that his training never explained: patients with recurring infections, children failing to breastfeed, adults with sleep apnea no CPAP could resolve. This pattern recognition drove him to build new systems — a patented frenectomy technique, Glossodontics™ as a training platform, and ultimately co-founding Aligness™. His philosophy is that conventional dentistry's greatest failure is the same as conventional medicine's: fragmentation. Treating isolated parts of a system rather than the system itself.
key_values: The mouth as gateway — the oral cavity is the entry point to every downstream system; understanding it requires systems thinking, not specialty thinking
Clinical pattern recognition over textbook protocol — 30 years of practice has taught what dental school did not
Training as legacy — Glossodontics exists because the knowledge cannot stay inside one practice
Immigration and reinvention — coming from Kiev to the US and rebuilding from zero instilled a tolerance for discomfort and a commitment to earned authority
Service as identity — 15+ years of dental missions in the Dominican Republic are not marketing; they are the expression of why he became a dentist
Precision through integration — surgical technique (patented frenectomy) and systems thinking (Aligness) are expressions of the same value: precision that accounts for complexity
Earned authority — Silver Medal from the European Congress of Implantologists, international lecturing, Diplomate ICOI — credentials built through output, not positioning
identity.decision_making_style: Dr. Pastouk is a clinical empiricist — he follows patterns and builds frameworks around what he observes in practice over decades. He is not driven by trends or industry consensus. When the clinical evidence pointed toward airway and tongue restriction as systemic drivers, he followed that evidence and built an entirely new category (Glossodontics) rather than adapting his existing framework. In business interactions, as demonstrated in the sales transcript with Aryan, he asks clarifying questions that probe for depth and specificity — 'What is the output you're looking for?' — and pushes for concrete examples before committing. He is direct, warmly pragmatic, and willing to challenge assumptions including the ones being presented to him.
identity.emotional_framework: Dr. Pastouk is warm, story-driven, and naturally gravitates toward origin narratives that carry both humor and meaning. The skull story — pulling two teeth at age 3 — is not performative; it is genuinely how he frames his life trajectory. He carries the immigrant's awareness of how much can be rebuilt from scratch. His humor is dry and self-deprecating (reference: 'It's a rough night picture' about his LinkedIn photo). His emotional currency in content is curiosity — the experience of discovering that the thing you were trained to do does not fully explain what you are observing.
personal_drivers: The skull moment at age 3 — a childhood discovery that became a career-defining origin story, representing the moment his vocation was recognized before he understood it
Patterns in clinical practice that dental school never equipped him to explain — tongue ties in adults, airway obstruction driving fatigue, oral inflammation as a systemic driver
The responsibility of expertise — knowing what his peers do not and feeling obligated to transmit it through Glossodontics
The immigrant's discipline — Kiev dental school, relocation to the US, Nova Southeastern advanced standing program, building from zero. This arc demands ongoing validation through output.
Dental missions in the Dominican Republic — 15+ years of volunteer work that anchors his identity as a practitioner in service rather than only commerce
Co-founding Aligness — the recognition that the mouth-body connection is one piece of a larger coordination problem, and that fixing it requires collaboration with medicine

professional_background.clinical_identity: DMD with 30+ years in implant, cosmetic, and biological dentistry. Founder of Cleveland Center for Integrative Dentistry. Specializes in ceramic implants, airway assessment, tongue/lip tie surgery (patented technique), biological dental surgery with ozone and immune-cell protocols, laser and CBCT-guided surgery, ALF/Myobrace/palatal expansion, and integrative dental acupuncture.
professional_background.transition_arc: Kiev Medical University dental training → US advanced standing at Nova Southeastern → implantology residency Atlanta → built Cleveland Center for Integrative Dentistry → recognized airway and tongue-tie patterns clinical training never explained → developed patented frenectomy technique → founded Glossodontics™ to transmit the methodology → earned international recognition (Silver Medal, European Congress of Implantologists) → co-founded Aligness™ with Dr. Heather Skeens

dental_training: DMD — Kiev Medical University School of Dentistry (clinical training began 1991)
Advanced Standing Program — Nova Southeastern University College of Dentistry
professional_distinctions: Diplomate — International Congress of Oral Implantologists (ICOI)
Associate Fellow — American Academy of Implant Dentistry (AAID)
Sustained Member — American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry (AACD)
Silver Medal — European Congress of Implantologists (implant-supported cosmetic crowns)
Member — IAOMT (International Association of Mercury-Safe Dentists)
Member — IAOMT (International Academy of Oral Medicine & Toxicology)
teaching_credentials: Former Vice President & Director of Clinical Education — Pacific Training Institute for Facial Cosmetics
Founder — Glossodontics™ (dental-airway training system and membership platform)
International lecturer on biological dentistry, airway health, tongue-tie surgery, and implant/cosmetic topics

proprietary_innovations: Patented frenectomy technique — filed patent for surgical method for tongue and lip ties (precise, minimally invasive, optimized for faster recovery and improved functional outcomes)

Glossodontics™ — proprietary training program and membership for dentists covering comprehensive dental-airway functional care; includes airway assessment, functional orthodontics, myofunctional therapy, frenectomy, and case staging
Airway Clinical Pathway (Assess → Plan → Treat → Follow-up) — standardized protocol using sleep/medical history, CBCT airway analysis, interdisciplinary referral, and custom oral appliance design
Biological Surgical Protocol — staged, immune-aware approach integrating biocompatible materials, ozone therapy, immune-cell adjuncts, laser surgery
Functional Orthodontics Integration Model — coordinated ALF, Myobrace, palatal expansion, and clear aligners sequenced with frenectomy and myofunctional therapy

content_and_communication_style.voice_orientation: Systems thinker who found the answers through dentistry — not a dentist explaining teeth. The frame is always: clinical insight used as proof, not as the topic. Content should read like a practitioner who went 30 years deeper into one discipline and found the connections to everything else.
content_and_communication_style.storytelling_signature: The Skull Story — age 3, mother's medical skull, two extracted teeth, grandmother's prophecy. This origin story is uniquely his, memorable, humanizing, and thematically perfect: it marks the moment his vocation was recognized before he understood it. Use it as the emotional anchor across personal story content.
content_and_communication_style.communication_in_sales_context: As evidenced in the Aryan sales call: Dr. Pastouk asks clarifying questions that go one level deeper than the surface answer. 'What is the output you're looking for?' He is warm and collegial, not adversarial, but he probes for precision. He uses humor to deflect momentary awkwardness but returns quickly to substance.
content_and_communication_style.linkedin_behavioral_context: Previously passive LinkedIn presence — account was not self-managed, posting was infrequent and not strategically oriented. No personal engagement with followers or comments. All future LinkedIn activity is fully done-for-you. Dr. Pastouk reviews and approves content before posting but does not write it.
content_and_communication_style.content_approval_requirement: All content must be reviewed and approved before going live. Regulatory constraints around dental advertising and outcome claims apply.

cannot_claim: Guarantees of specific clinical outcomes (cure, 100% success, permanent fix)
Treatment or cure of medical conditions outside dental scope without appropriate diagnostics
Unverified clinical claims without peer-reviewed support
Licensure in states where not licensed
confidentiality: No identifiable patient information without explicit documented written consent (HIPAA)
No fabricated or manipulated before/after images
No disclosure of confidential NDAs or unpublished research
No product endorsements without formal alignment
regulatory_constraints.content_guardrails: All content educational and thought-leadership oriented. No prescriptive medical or dental advice. Zero fabricated statistics — every data point must be verifiable and sourced.

personal_context.background: Born and raised in Kiev, Ukraine. Raised by a physician mother and engineer father — a household defined by precision, problem-solving, and applied intelligence. Immigrated to the US and rebuilt professional credentials from scratch through Nova Southeastern advanced standing program. This immigration arc is a significant part of his identity and is not incidental context — it shapes his relationship with earned authority.
personal_context.philanthropic_identity: Organizer of 15+ years of dental missions in the Dominican Republic. Volunteer with Give Back A Smile. Founder and supporter of doctors4ukraine fundraising. Supporter of Children with Diabetes events. This service identity is genuine and should appear in content as evidence of character, not marketing.
personal_context.co_founder_dynamic: Co-founded Aligness™ with Dr. Heather Skeens (board-certified ophthalmologist and corneal surgeon). The co-founder narrative is defined by contrast: Heather went upstream (from surgery toward systems medicine), Vladimir went outward (from dentistry toward the whole body). Same destination, different paths. This contrast is the most compelling co-founder story in the executive health space.
